title: University of Southampton Delhi Under-18 Admissions Policy
text: Policy on admission of students under the age of 18 This policy outlines the University’s approach to admitting such students, highlighting the additional responsibilities, safeguards, and parental/guardian involvement required under Indian law. Resources PDF Policy for under 18s 105 KB
summary: The University of Southampton Delhi's policy for admitting students under 18 outlines responsibilities, safeguards, and parental involvement as mandated by Indian law, with a downloadable PDF resource.
entities: Policy on admission of students under the age of 18
